title: diplopterygium laevissimum
intro: Diplopterygium laevissimum, also known as the Chinese spikenard or Chinese polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diplopterygium laevissimum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as improving cardiovascular health and reducing stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried, processed into a powder, or made into tea or tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
